title: microlicia rundeliana
intro: Microlicia rundeliana is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "Maypop". This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Microlicia rundeliana include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Microlicia rundeliana are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of the plant's medicinal properties.
